response:
* The abstract discusses how astrocytic coverage affects glutamate clearance and synaptic efficacy.  
* It links reduced glutamate clearance to decreased transmitter release.  
* The study shows that glial coverage influences presynaptic metabotropic glutamate receptors.  
* Astrocytic wrapping is associated with regulating synaptic efficacy.  
* The title mentions "glial coverage of neurons" which matches the abstract.  
* The abstract emphasizes the role of astrocytes in controlling glutamate concentration.  
* It highlights that reduced glial coverage affects synaptic transmission.  
* The title states "control of glutamate clearance and synaptic efficacy" which is supported by the abstract.  
* The abstract and title both focus on the relationship between glial coverage and synaptic regulation.
